message: 9zrs2 require crypto validation for soft-token certs

files.patch:
@@ -66,6 +66,7 @@ windows = { version = "0.62", features = ["Win32_System_Time"] }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 # Testing
+ed25519-dalek = { workspace = true, features = ["pkcs8"] }
 pretty_assertions.workspace = true
 rand_chacha = "0.3"
 tempfile = "3.15"
